message:
feat: Simplify public API from 50+ to 6 exports

Reduce public API surface to essential exports only:
- vault, Vault, TableRef - Local SQL database (primary)
- LanceQL - Remote dataset access (primary)
- RemoteLanceDataset, LocalDatabase - Advanced users

Bundle size reduced 66% (573KB → 193KB) via tree-shaking.
Update example page to use only public API imports.
